_disclaimer: APPROXIMATE DATA — Tax incentive programs change frequently. Data is from public state legislation and economic development websites. Verify with state officials before making investment decisions.
_sources: National Conference of State Legislatures (ncsl.org) - public
State economic development agency websites - public
Data Center Knowledge news analysis - public
State legislature bill tracking websites - public

tax_incentives.notes: Machinery/equipment sales tax exempt; grant up to $35M for qualifying projects

tax_incentives.program_name: Oregon Enterprise Zone / Data Center Tax Exemption
tax_incentives.notes: Up to 5-year property tax exemption in enterprise zones; Morrow, Umatilla, Hood River counties

tax_incentives.notes: Sales tax deferral on construction; B&O tax reduction for rural counties

Transaction privilege tax exemption on equipment; property tax valuation reduction

tax_incentives.incentive_type: Property Tax Limitation + Sales Tax Exemption

Sales tax exemption on computer equipment and electricity for qualifying DCs

tax_incentives.incentive_type: Sales/Use Tax Abatement + Property Tax Abatement
tax_incentives.notes: Up to 75% sales tax abatement; 50% personal property tax abatement for 10 years

tax_incentives.notes: Sales tax exemption on equipment; job creation tax credit through Ohio Development

tax_incentives.notes: IT equipment sales tax exemption; EDGE credit for job creation

tax_incentives.notes: Sales tax refund on server equipment; local property tax incentive agreements

tax_incentives.notes: Full sales tax exemption on equipment; jobs tax credit $1,500-8,000 per job
